allow: PowerShell($headers = @\("Identity", "Directory Structure", "Rules", "Page Conventions", "Workflows", "index.md Maintenance", "log.md Maintenance", "Domain Tags Reference"\); $content = Get-Content "E:\\My Knowledge\\CLAUDE.md" -Raw; foreach \($h in $headers\) { $found = $content -match "## $h"; Write-Output "$h : $found" })

PowerShell($lines = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllLines\("E:\\My Knowledge\\ingest-manifest.md"\); $out = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[string]; for \($i=0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++\) { if \($i -eq 16 -and $lines[$i] -eq ''\) { continue }; $out.Add\($lines[$i]\) }; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllLines\("E:\\My Knowledge\\ingest-manifest.md", $out\); \(Select-String '^- raw/' "E:\\My Knowledge\\ingest-manifest.md"\).Count)

PowerShell(Get-Content "E:\\My Knowledge\\log.md" -Tail 6; ""; Get-Content "E:\\My Knowledge\\ingest-manifest.md" -Tail 2; ""; \(Select-String '^- raw/' "E:\\My Knowledge\\ingest-manifest.md"\).Count)
